svg.title: Quartermaster purchase data flow
svg.desc: A purchase flows through eight steps: Stripe checkout, webhook verification, enqueueing, the signer polling and signing, marking the request signed, emailing the license, first activation, and fully offline verification on every launch after.

g.text: Stripe Checkout Session, product + seats in metadata
HMAC over raw body, 5-min replay window
US-only, seats floored at 1, capped at 24
Ed25519 over the 33-byte payload, offline key
Key stored in sign_requests either way
Failure logged, never blocks the request
One network call, checks seats and revocation
No further network call, no expiry, no phone-home
